item.name: Factset Get Underlying Holdings Information for a Requested Fund Identifer.

request.name: Factset Get Underlying Holdings Information for a Requested Fund Identifer.

description.content: Gets holdings information for list of fund identifiers. The service allows you to filter by the TopN holdings and Asset Type.

query.description:
(Required) List of requested fund identifiers.

***ids limit** = 10 per request*
Date of holdings expressed in YYYY-MM-DD format. The fund-holdings endpoint will default to latest month-end close.
Limits number of holdings or holders displayed by the top *n* securities based on positions Market Value. Default is ALL, otherwise use number to limit number.

Filter holdings by the following major asset classes -
  * **EQ**  = Equity
  * **FI** = Fixed Income
  * **ALL** = ALL
Currency code for adjusting prices. Default is Local. For a list of currency ISO codes, visit [Online Assistant Page 1470](https://oa.apps.factset.com/pages/1470).

response.name: Fund Holdings Response.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: basic

item.name: Factset Get Security Ownership Data for Requested Security Identifers.

request.name: Factset Get Security Ownership Data for Requested Security Identifers.

description.content: Gets security ownership details and activity for the requested security identifiers. The services allows filtering by "Topn" holders and by holder "type", such as Institutions, Insiders, and Stakeholders.

query.description:
(Required) Requested list of security identifiers.

***ids limit** = 1 per request*

.

Controls the Holder Type of the data returned. By default, the service will return Institutional Holders. Requesting All Holders is not currently supported. Only a single Holder Type is allowed per request.
  * **F** = Institutions
  * **M** = Mutual Funds
  * **S** =  Insiders/Stakeholders
  * **FS** = Institutions/Insiders
  * **B** = Beneficial Owners
Limits number of holdings or holders displayed by the top *n* securities based on positions Market Value. Default is ALL, otherwise use number to limit number.
Date of holdings expressed in YYYY-MM-DD format. The fund-holdings endpoint will default to latest month-end close.
Currency code for adjusting prices. Default is Local. For a list of currency ISO codes, visit [Online Assistant Page 1470](https://oa.apps.factset.com/pages/1470).

item.name: Factset Get Underlying Holdings Information for a Requested Fund Identifer.

request.name: Factset Get Underlying Holdings Information for a Requested Fund Identifer.

description.content: Gets holdings information for list of fund identifiers. The service allows you to filter by the TopN holdings and Asset Type.

query.description:
(Required) List of requested fund identifiers.

***ids limit** = 10 per request*
Date of holdings expressed in YYYY-MM-DD format. The fund-holdings endpoint will default to latest month-end close.
Limits number of holdings or holders displayed by the top *n* securities based on positions Market Value. Default is ALL, otherwise use number to limit number.

Filter holdings by the following major asset classes -
  * **EQ**  = Equity
  * **FI** = Fixed Income
  * **ALL** = ALL
Currency code for adjusting prices. Default is Local. For a list of currency ISO codes, visit [Online Assistant Page 1470](https://oa.apps.factset.com/pages/1470).

item.name: Factset Get Security Ownership Data for Requested Security Identifers.

request.name: Factset Get Security Ownership Data for Requested Security Identifers.

description.content: Gets security ownership details and activity for the requested security identifiers. The services allows filtering by "Topn" holders and by holder "type", such as Institutions, Insiders, and Stakeholders.

query.description:
(Required) Requested list of security identifiers.

***ids limit** = 1 per request*

.

Controls the Holder Type of the data returned. By default, the service will return Institutional Holders. Requesting All Holders is not currently supported. Only a single Holder Type is allowed per request.
  * **F** = Institutions
  * **M** = Mutual Funds
  * **S** =  Insiders/Stakeholders
  * **FS** = Institutions/Insiders
  * **B** = Beneficial Owners
Limits number of holdings or holders displayed by the top *n* securities based on positions Market Value. Default is ALL, otherwise use number to limit number.
Date of holdings expressed in YYYY-MM-DD format. The fund-holdings endpoint will default to latest month-end close.
Currency code for adjusting prices. Default is Local. For a list of currency ISO codes, visit [Online Assistant Page 1470](https://oa.apps.factset.com/pages/1470).

item.name: Factset Get Security Ownership Data for a List of Requested Securities.

request.name: Factset Get Security Ownership Data for a List of Requested Securities.

description.content: Gets security ownership details and activity for the requested security identifiers. The services allows filtering by "Topn" holders and by holder "type", such as Institutions, Insiders, and Stakeholders.

description.content:
FactSet's Fund Ownership API gives access to underlying fund holding
details for a specified fund ID or list of IDs. Holdings details include
industry codes, security identifiers, adjusted market value, adjusted
shares held, and issue type.

Contact Support:
 Name: FactSet Research Systems
 Email: api@factset.com
